imported.provenance: build bar lawine #316 (5lnz5jgb) on denken #304/#295/#297; measured cov_W + frac wirbel #79 (z6wi4z4v); the trained {2,21,39} fusion head fern #34 (gua9x68j, W&B-verified eval/* summary); a1-cliff envelope denken #308 (5axqa6oa); published EAGLE-3 (arXiv 2503.01840), EAGLE-1 (2401.15077), HASS (2408.15766), Medusa, KOALA (2408.08146). Achievability synthesis + per-source decomposition + verdict are this card (#323).

step1_reproduce_bar.note: salvage identity c1_eff=a1+(1-a1)*cov4_cond == unconditional top-4, so the build bar c1_eff>=T is REGIME-INVARIANT: every conditional-frac bar (0.2907@a1=0.72925, 0.3468@0.7731, 0.3443@fern native 0.7714) maps to the SAME unconditional top-4 == 0.9213. The deployed LINEAR spine sits at unconditional top-4 0.9061 (a1 0.72925, cov4 0.6532) -- 0.0152 BELOW the bar, which is exactly why #316 read linear_spine_clears=False.

denken308_recheck.note: denken #308's 'essentially achieved' paired fern native a1 0.7714 with the BORROWED linear cov4 0.6532 -> c1_eff 0.9207 ~= bar. fern's OWN aggregate cov4 (0.5395, MCQ-dragged) gives 0.8947 (MISS); its free-form aime cov4 (0.727) gives 0.9375 (CLEAR). The linear->fusion cov transfer is NOT uniform -- it is distribution-dependent.

step2_fern34_measured.note: fern #34 is the ONLY trained {2,21,39} fusion head. AGGREGATE tf top-4 = 0.8903 < bar 0.9213 (MISS by 0.0310); conditional cov4 0.5395 < linear 0.6532 -- the denken #308/#313 selection-effect YELLOW MATERIALIZED on aggregate. BUT per-source is decisive: free-form aime top-4 0.9570 (cov4 0.7268 > linear -> CLEARS), MCQ mmlu_pro 0.8465 (cov4 0.4874). The aggregate is dragged down by the MCQ answer-letter tail (pathologically low-coverage). The deployment distribution (official ShareGPT, free-form, NO MCQ letters) sits toward the aime end. fern #34 is also undertrained for this bar: K=1, hard-CE, no soft-KD, no TTT.

step3_literature.note: EAGLE root 0-alpha ~ 0.74-0.79; EAGLE-3 tau 5.84-6.65. EAGLE-2->3 ablation: TTT +1.32 tau (63% of the gain) vs fused features +0.76 tau (37%). KEY: TTT/on-policy lifts DEPTH>=2 robustness, NOT the root (HASS 0-alpha moves [-0.025, 0.01] -- can DROP). The root-coverage lever is FUSION, which fern #34 ALREADY spent. No paper tabulates top-k coverage; the cross-paper estimate for a fully-trained head (a1~0.765) is top-4 ~ 0.913 [0.899,0.929] -- the 0.9213 bar at the BAND CENTER, no safety margin.

step4_verdict.caveats: fern #34's top-4 is TEACHER-FORCED on the reasoning holdout (root tf ~= native, gap 0.0097, so the regime gap is DISTRIBUTION not tf-vs-native). The 0.9213 bar holds the deep spine at the build-uniform target (#316 step3); position-1 root coverage is necessary, NOT sufficient -- the deployed deep spine still caps E[T] at 4.91 (#316), so a root-coverage GO does not by itself build 6.11. No fusion checkpoint is deployed; the drafter BUILD stays human-gated. 0 TPS; BASELINE 481.53 unchanged.
step4_verdict.rationale: MARGINAL (not ACHIEVABLE-with-margin, not UNLIKELY). (1) The bar (unconditional top-4 >= 0.9213) sits at the CENTER of the published achievable band [0.899,0.929] -- no safety margin. (2) The ONLY trained fusion head (fern #34) STRADDLES it: aggregate 0.8903 MISSES by 0.031, but free-form aime 0.9570 CLEARS and gpqa 0.9176 nearly clears; the MCQ answer-letter tail (mmlu_pro 0.8465) drags the aggregate. (3) The deployment distribution (official ShareGPT, free-form) has NO MCQ-letter tokens, so its coverage sits toward the clearing aime end -- but it is UNMEASURED, the binding unknown. (4) The root-coverage lever is FUSION (already spent in fern #34); TTT (the main remaining EAGLE-3 upgrade) lifts depth>=2, not the root (HASS 0-alpha can even drop). So the path from 0.8903 -> 0.9213 is NOT reliably delivered by the standard EAGLE-3 training roadmap; the credible levers are (a) the deployment distribution being free-form, (b) soft-KD top-k calibration, (c) more root training -- all plausible, all UNTESTED on this target.
step4_verdict.resolves_308_yellow: Resolves denken #308's 'cov_W linear->fusion transfer' YELLOW on the ACHIEVABILITY side: the transfer is REAL on free-form text (fern aime cov4 0.727 > linear 0.653) but the MCQ-contaminated aggregate (0.5395) sits below linear -- so #308's borrowed-linear-cov 'essentially achieved' was OPTIMISTIC. ACHIEVABLE iff the deployment-distribution coverage lands toward the free-form end. (denken #320 handles the step-regime demand side.)
step4_verdict.supporting_coverage_delta: Bar (deployed a1) needs cov4 0.6532 -> 0.7093 (+0.0561) over the linear spine, i.e. fusion MUST beat linear's rank-coverage. fern #34: free-form aime cov4 0.7268 (+0.0736 vs linear -> BEATS, clears); aggregate cov4 0.5395 (-0.1136 vs linear -> MCQ-dragged below, misses). The linear->fusion coverage advantage IS present on free-form text but NOT on the MCQ-heavy aggregate.
step4_verdict.what_flips_the_verdict: ONE measurement: run the wirbel #79 RANKPROBE_W=4 probe on the fern #34 fusion head over the OFFICIAL 128 ShareGPT eval prompts (NOT the reasoning holdout it was evaluated on), native on-path. Its unconditional top-4 there flips MARGINAL -> GO (>= 0.9213) / NO-GO (< 0.9213). Zero served-file change, single GPU, greedy/PPL untouched -- same read-only scratch-probe lawine #313 pre-registered.
